title: The Mutiny Pack (Minecraft Resource Pack)
description:
Who decided combining the Block Tales (and other's) OST(s) and Minecraft would be a good idea?
Me.
And now, you can FINALLY experience the feeling of "true mutiny!"
Every music disc song has been replaced with a certain song. That's pretty much it.
body:
Have you ever wanted to put your favorite OSTS and songs into Minecraft? Well, that's EXACTLY what we did here. We replaced the menu music, music discs, and in game music (coming soon), with our favorite songs, such as "I'm Your Captain Now" (by The Recovery System), and LITERALLY ANYTHING ELSE.

That's all I have to say.
Go play this.
Or don't.
We can't stop you.
